title: pricesFields
description:
Request available pricing data fields to be included in the response. Default is all fields. All responses will include the _fsymId_, _date_, and _currency_ fields.
  |field|description|
  |||
  |price|Closing Price|
  |priceOpen|Opening Price|
  |priceHigh|High Price|
  |priceLow|Low Price|
  |volume|Volume|
  |turnover|Total Trade Value for the Day|
  |tradeCount|Number of Trades|
  |vwap|Volume Weighted Average Price|
